criteria_verification.evidence: Added a [project.scripts] block to pyproject.toml (after [project.optional-dependencies]) with `forge = "forge.cli.main:main"`, accompanied by a TASK-PSM-012 comment cross-referencing the entry-point assertion test. criteria_verification.criterion_text: `forge --help` runs and exits 0; output lists all five subcommands
criteria_verification.evidence: Verified with `python3 -m pip install --user --dry-run --no-deps -e . --break-system-packages` — exit 0, no output (success). The build backend (setuptools.build_meta) parses pyproject.toml cleanly with the new [project.scripts] block. Surrogate test test_console_script_target_resolves_to_a_click_group emulates what the pip-installed shim does at invocation time (importlib.import_module('forge.cli.main') and assert isinstance(main, click.Group)) — that operation succeeds.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: Smoke test: `forge status` against an empty SQLite DB returns an
criteria_verification.evidence: TestEverySubcommandHelpExitsZero parametrises over ('queue', 'status', 'history', 'cancel', 'skip') and asserts each `forge <sub> --help` returns exit 0 and renders a Click `Usage:` banner. All five parametrised cases pass.
criteria_verification.notes: TestEverySubcommandHelpExitsZero parametrises over ('queue', 'status', 'history', 'cancel', 'skip') and asserts each `forge <sub> --help` returns exit 0 and renders a Click `Usage:` banner. All five parametrised cases pass.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestStatusSmokeAgainstEmptyDb fixtures a fresh SQLite database initialised via forge.lifecycle.migrations.apply_at_boot (zero rows). Test test_status_against_empty_db_exits_zero_with_header_only asserts exit 0 and that the BUILD/STATUS column headers render. Test test_status_smoke_does_not_attempt_a_nats_connection patches forge.cli.queue.publish with an AssertionError trip-wire and asserts the status path completes with exit 0 — the trip-wire never fires, proving the status command does not invoke the NATS publisher seam.
criteria_verification.notes: TestStatusSmokeAgainstEmptyDb fixtures a fresh SQLite database initialised via forge.lifecycle.migrations.apply_at_boot (zero rows). Test test_status_against_empty_db_exits_zero_with_header_only asserts exit 0 and that the BUILD/STATUS column headers render. Test test_status_smoke_does_not_attempt_a_nats_connection patches forge.cli.queue.publish with an AssertionError trip-wire and asserts the status path completes with exit 0 — the trip-wire never fires, proving the status command does not invoke the NATS publisher seam.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestPyprojectOnlyBuildSystem verifies that neither setup.py nor setup.cfg exists at the repo root.
